nodes.label: Tax Calculation Logic and Rounding
nodes.rationale: Invoice totals are calculated by summing pre-rounded line items rather than rounding the final invoice total to prevent cumulative rounding errors.

nodes.label: Database Migrations Framework
nodes.rationale: Rollbacks should avoid destructive SQL drops and instead rely on deploying previous application versions, keeping changes additive to maintain backward compatibility.

nodes.label: Split Payment & Multi-Method Checkout
nodes.rationale: Unpaid invoices are created for non-cash methods to require manual reconciliation, while cash payments are assumed settled immediately.

nodes.label: Meilisearch Outbox Alert Triggers & Playbooks
nodes.rationale: Worker checks event version_ts and database row version to ignore stale outbox events, maintaining search sync consistency.
